title: carex distans subsp. binervis
intro: Carex distans subsp. binervis, also known as two-veined sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Carex genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems. Carex distans subsp. binervis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
